scope: Q1 read-only review: plan conformance, diff boundary, SQL parameterization/allowlist, mapping semantics/tests, A3 evidence, runtime not-ready disclosure, and release blockers.
claim_scope: Return PASS, PASS_WITH_RISKS, NEEDS_FIX, or BLOCKED with specific file:line findings. Do not edit source.
source_basis: Approved plan; implementation paths under master/controller, entity, service, repository; evidence directory A1/A2/A3; tracker progress.json.
must_preserve: Read-only review; report mapping parent-missing assumption A3 separately from implemented behavior; do not inflate runtime readiness.
do_not_touch: All source files, tracker status, plan, migrations, middleware, package manifests, compose/env.
validation: Read changed files and evidence; run/inspect targeted tests and build evidence; grep new SQL for request interpolation; inspect tracker and diff boundary.
exit_criteria: Write Q1-review.md with outcome, acceptance matrix, blockers/risks, diff boundary verdict, runtime verdict, and recommendation.
context_bundle: confirmed_repo/runtime: plan readiness PASS; A1 5 controller tests pass; A2 8 repository tests pass and build pass; A3 full `go test ./...` 408/23 + build success. Compose status empty and token unavailable, runtime smoke documented not-ready. Semgrep tool unavailable (binary absent). Parent-missing/inactive enabled mapping remains plan A3 assumption; implementation LEFT JOIN yields null primary fields in that scenario. Workspace has no Git repository, so diff check is path/evidence-based. Execute review only.
